criteria_results.description: Pressing Ctrl+C when an object is selected updates the `clipboardObject` in `DocumentState`.
criteria_results.evidence: Implemented in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx` within the `editorReducer` under the `COPY_OBJECT` case (lines 182-187), and triggered in `client/src/components/editor/Canvas.tsx` by the `keydown` event listener (lines 60-63).

criteria_results.description: Pressing Ctrl+V creates a new object in the `objects` array with a unique UUID.
criteria_results.evidence: Implemented in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx` within the `editorReducer` under the `PASTE_OBJECT` case (line 190), which uses `uuidv4()` to generate a new ID for the duplicated object.

criteria_results.description: Pasted objects are placed with a coordinate offset relative to the original.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx`, the `PASTE_OBJECT` case calculates an offset (`20 / state.scale`) and applies it to the `x` and `y` coordinates of the new object (lines 191-196).

criteria_results.description: Keyboard listeners are cleaned up on component unmount.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/Canvas.tsx`, the `useEffect` hook that adds the `keydown` listener returns a cleanup function: `return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);` (line 72).

criteria_results.description: Paste operation is blocked if the clipboard is empty or no layer is active.
criteria_results.evidence: The `PASTE_OBJECT` case in `editorReducer` starts with a conditional guard: `if (!state.clipboardObject || !state.activeLayerId) return state;` (line 189).

suggestions: Consider adding a visual feedback (like a brief highlight or toast) when an object is copied/pasted to improve user experience.
The current implementation only copies the last selected object if multiple are selected; future iterations could support multi-object copy-paste.
next_focus: Task completed successfully. No further actions required for this iteration.
